item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
apparently the translation is "Dance with me I'll give you whatever you want A massage Your favorite dinner when we get to the house Dance with me" greetings online friends
man that looks good
overkill
good times
absolutely not
this would be me if i drank now since i haven't in over a decade
classic prank
he must be infinity years old
what if we kissed while one of us was on it
no need to brag
mmm hmm
mmm hmm
Ruth?
don't listen to this guy. it's totally fine
happens all the time if there's a music or sports category
we've all done this
i guess
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: I learned a new magic trick!
item.description: Source : https://youtube.com/shorts/gIVisSorzHI Hopefully this video unlocked your childhood memory of using the Christmas gift wrap paper leftover cardboard tubes as lightsabers! Remember doing the sounds with your mouth too? That's where the inspo for this video comes from haha Have a great day everyone! Yuzu

item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: When your worst fear comes true
item.description: My team has tried to prank me many times and many times I’ve foiled their devious little plans….Then I walk into our conference room Halloween. After about 5 minutes of uncontrollable laughter they all broke into “Character” and started doing their impressions of me…..I haven’t laughed that hard ever….it was a day for the ages. I hope everyone who’s in leadership can hit the lottery like I did with my team. Edit - I’m back row center.
item.dc:creator: Usernamemustbemorethan4characters

item.title: HELLO IMGUR TODAY I AM THE SHOUTING BIOLOGIST AND HERE ARE SOME UNCONVENTIONAL SHAPED FOXES
item.description:
THIS IS THE TIBETAN FOX AND HIS HEAD IS VERY SQUARE.
THIS IS A KIT FOX. HE IS SLEEK AND SILVERY AND I LOVE HIM.
THIS IS AN ARCTIC FOX IN THE WINTER. THEY ARE NOT THAT COLOR WHEN IT IS NOT THE WINTER.
THIS IS A DARWIN'S FOX. I DON'T ACTUALLY KNOW WHY HE IS CALLED A DARWIN'S FOX.
AND HERE IS MY ABSOLUTE FAVORITE THE BAT-EARED FOX. LOOK AT THOSE EARS. WHAT A CREATIVE NAME, NAMING AN ANIMAL AFTER ANOTHER ANIMAL!

item.title: Memes vol 404
item.description:
Me in this exact moment- chris wants to watch inglorious bastards and I want to watch Cabaret (we’re watching cabaret rn and IB next)
Does someone have the original pic because I’d love to see it
@graehall this is absolutely amazing
SERIOUSLY!! All these guys want goth gfs and they’re just some dude- where’s that meme, there’s a meme about it
Jael my beloved (I was raised Christian for 18 years- you retain some of it)
Scarlet Ibis is so good
Lost boys my beloved
Yeah MOTHER
Me singing newsies
Women are not allowed in this world WHAT?!?! WHAT?!?! WHAT?!?!?! Let’s try this again women and women are not the same thing as men and women are the same thing and we are not the only ones who are not the same- yes indeed I couldn’t have said it better myself
Sheepshead- I’ll never understand sheepshead
Scruffy and Liza Jane tax
Nessie tax
Froggy tax

item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: Either Bad Math or Bad Corporate Explanation: Amazon night workers walk out after they were expected to work an extra hour for free due to daylight saving
item.description: Amazon employee in Tampa, Florida, said that they and other night shift workers were expected to work extra after clocks fell back an hour on Sunday to mark the end of daylight saving time. As a result, they said everyone left an hour early. In a follow-up video, talking with a superior. The manager—who appeared off camera—appeared to confirm that some Amazon night shift workers didn’t get an extra hours pay. “So for the ones who worked yesterday, if they worked the whole shift are they getting paid 11 hours or just ten?” “Ten hours,” the person replied before the video, which has more than 62,300 views, abruptly ended. It’s not clear that these rules apply to all of Amazon’s night workers, however. In a Reddit thread from 2020, another Amazon worker asked what would happen when the clocks changed. Though the redditor admitted that they were bracing to work an additional hour with no pay, commenters said that wouldn’t be the case. “Let’s say you work 6:30pm – 5:00am, you will clock out at 4:00am,” one viewer wrote. “Clocks roll back at 2.” “We just got a text about it for my FC,” another added. “You work your regular shift including the extra hour and are of course paid for it.” https://www.dailydot.com/news/amazon-worker-unpaid-extra-hour-daylight-savings/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin
